title: MissingPerson
description: A public missing-persons or unidentified-decedent case surfaced through OCME's Identification Unit and the federal NamUs system (namus.nij.ojp.gov). These listings are deliberately public and non-identifying-by-name for unidentified decedents — they carry only the descriptive detail meant to AID identification (estimated age range, sex, where found), never confidential investigative findings. OCME participates in NamUs; there is no OCME-owned Open Data twin.

ocmeCaseNumber.description: OCME case / accession number, where the case is an unidentified decedent.

dateReportedOrFound.description: Date reported missing, or date remains were found.

locationFound.description: General location associated with the case (non-precise).
